Package com.example.getoutthere.navigation

Class NavBottomHelper

java.lang.Object
com.example.getoutthere.navigation.NavBottomHelper
public class NavBottomHelper extends Object
Helper class for bottom navigation setup and intent routing.

  • Constructor Details

    • NavBottomHelper

      public NavBottomHelper()

  • Method Details

    • setupBottomNav

      public static void setupBottomNav(Activity activity, com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView bottomNav, int selectedItemId)
      Configures the BottomNavigationView for the provided activity. Sets the currently selected item, triggers the check for admin privileges, and establishes the item selection listener to navigate between core application screens seamlessly without animation.
      Parameters:
      activity - The current Activity context where the navigation bar resides.
      bottomNav - The BottomNavigationView instance to be configured.
      selectedItemId - The resource ID of the menu item that should be actively highlighted.

    • procSecretAdminDoor

      public static void procSecretAdminDoor(com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView bottomNav)
      Conditionally reveals a hidden "Admin Dashboard" navigation item in the bottom menu. Queries the Firebase Firestore "admins" collection using the device's local ID. If a matching document exists, the user is recognized as an admin and the menu item is made visible.
      Parameters:
      bottomNav - The BottomNavigationView whose menu will be modified if admin rights are verified.
